network.c(3) Library Functions Manual network.c(3)

NAME

network.c - Network protocol options.

SYNOPSIS

Variables


const registry_entry_t g_network_entries []

Detailed Description

Network protocol options.

Options for controlling ports, compression, discovery, WebRTC, and network connectivity.

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

January 2026

Definition in file options/registry/network.c.

Variable Documentation

const registry_entry_t g_network_entries[]

Definition at line 21 of file options/registry/network.c.

21                                            {
22     // NETWORK GROUP - port and client management
23     {"port",
24      'p',
25      OPTION_TYPE_CALLBACK,
26      offsetof(options_t, port),
27      NULL, // Use mode_default_getter instead
28      sizeof(int),
29      "Port to host a server or discovery-service on, or port to connect to a server as a client (default: 27224 for "
30      "server/client, 27225 for discovery-service).",
31      "NETWORK",
32      NULL,
33      false,
34      "ASCII_CHAT_PORT",
35      NULL,
36      parse_port_option,
37      false,
38      false,
39      OPTION_MODE_CLIENT | OPTION_MODE_SERVER | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY_SVC | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY,
40      {.numeric_range = {1, 65535, 1}, .input_type = OPTION_INPUT_NUMERIC},
41      get_default_port},
42     {"websocket-port",
43      '\0',
44      OPTION_TYPE_INT,
45      offsetof(options_t, websocket_port),
46      NULL, // Use mode_default_getter instead
47      sizeof(int),
48      "WebSocket server port (default: 27226 for server, 27227 for discovery-service, 443 when TLS cert+key provided).",
49      "NETWORK",
50      NULL,
51      false,
52      "ASCII_CHAT_WEBSOCKET_PORT",
53      NULL,
54      NULL,
55      false,
56      false,
57      OPTION_MODE_SERVER | OPTION_MODE_DISCOVERY_SVC,
58      {.numeric_range = {1, 65535, 1}, .input_type = OPTION_INPUT_NUMERIC},
59      get_default_websocket_port},
60     {"websocket-tls-cert",
61      '\0',
62      OPTION_TYPE_STRING,
63      offsetof(options_t, websocket_tls_cert),

65      OPTIONS_BUFF_SIZE,
66      "WebSocket TLS certificate file path for WSS (secure WebSocket) support (server/discovery-service only).",
67      "NETWORK",
68      NULL,
69      false,
70      "ASCII_CHAT_WEBSOCKET_TLS_CERT",

100      NULL,

102      "Password for password-protected WebSocket TLS private key (use ASCII_CHAT_WEBSOCKET_TLS_KEY_PASSWORD env var for "

133     {"reconnect-attempts",
134      '\0',
135      OPTION_TYPE_INT,
136      offsetof(options_t, reconnect_attempts),
137      &default_reconnect_attempts_value,
138      sizeof(int),
139      "Number of reconnection attempts before giving up (-1=infinite, 0=none).",
140      "NETWORK",
141      NULL,
142      false,
143      "ASCII_CHAT_RECONNECT_ATTEMPTS",
144      NULL,
145      NULL,
146      false,

161      "ASCII_CHAT_PORT_FORWARDING",

318     // NETWORK GROUP - WebRTC options

320      '\0',
321      OPTION_TYPE_BOOL,
322      offsetof(options_t, webrtc),
323      &default_webrtc_value,
324      sizeof(bool),

336      NULL},

339      OPTION_TYPE_BOOL,

341      &default_no_webrtc_value,
342      sizeof(bool),
343      "Disable WebRTC, use direct TCP only.",

349      NULL,

358      offsetof(options_t, prefer_webrtc),
359      &default_prefer_webrtc_value,
360      sizeof(bool),
361      "Try WebRTC before direct TCP.",
362      "NETWORK",
363      NULL,
364      false,

367      NULL,
368      false,

376      offsetof(options_t, webrtc_skip_stun),
377      &default_webrtc_skip_stun_value,
378      sizeof(bool),
379      "Skip WebRTC+STUN stage, go straight to TURN relay.",

383      "ASCII_CHAT_WEBRTC_SKIP_STUN",
384      NULL,
385      NULL,
386      false,
